title: README: from_uri() InvalidUri claim is wrong for multi-key absent ?key=
description: README.md says 'For multi-key Secrets, ?key= is required and from_uri will return SecretError::InvalidUri if it is absent.' from_uri() cannot know at construction time how many keys the Secret has — it makes no network call. The InvalidUri is returned by get() at read time. A user reading the README will test from_uri() and find it succeeds, then be surprised when get() fails. The documentation contract is wrong.
